candidates.reason: Contact was retained for review but not marked usable because its source or surrounding evidence could not be matched to the target registry clinic. Triage suppressed: High-confidence grounded LLM non-target ownership decision. The email is explicitly listed for the library/community place, while the target is the municipal GP practice. The same evidence separately lists the municipality with a different email (info@baks.hu), so this does not support ownership by the target clinic.
